title: stelis nepotula
intro: Stelis nepotula, also known as Stelis nepotula or Nepotula, is a flowering plant species in the orchid family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and improving overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Stelis nepotula is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support various health conditions and promote relaxation.
